steps.t: Kyrstig should be scouting somewhere near Adkhât-zahhar, the Houses of Rest, on the western side of the Pit of Stonejaws. You should find Kyrstig.
Kyrstig has discovered that the Angmarim are desecrating the Houses of Rest. You should help Krystig with quests in Akhaldarâg.
Kyrstig is near Akhaldarâg, north west of Bárgstad. You should talk to Kyrstig.
